visual_enhancers.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

layout_strategies.alignment: Left-aligned text with expansive negative space on the right
layout_strategies.hero_composition: Split screen: 40% Text / 60% Visual with overlapping abstract elements
layout_strategies.footer_style: Massive typography footer with 'Get in Touch' as the dominant visual

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-8 py-4 rounded-sm
buttons.outline: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-8 py-4 rounded-sm

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-white/20 text-white focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors

cards.service: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card/50 border border-white/5 p-8 hover:bg-card transition-all duration-500
cards.pricing: bg-gradient-to-b from-white/5 to-transparent border border-white/10 p-10 rounded-lg hover:border-primary/30 transition-all duration-300

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: `yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge` if not present.
CONFIG: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom colors (Deep Obsidian #050505, Gold #D4AF37) and fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope).
FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to `index.css` immediately.
LAYOUT: Do not use standard centered containers. Use asymmetric layouts.
NAVIGATION: Create a sticky header that blurs the background. It must be transparent black, NOT solid.
IMAGES: Use the `user_provided` assets for the 'Our Work' / 'Gallery' sections. Use `hero_bg` for the landing page hero background.
FORMS: Use Shadcn form components but style them to match the 'inputs.style' guideline (minimalist, bottom-border only).
ADMIN: The admin panel can use a more standard dashboard layout but must strictly follow the dark theme.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast on dark backgrounds. Use Gold #D4AF37 for large text/borders only, lighter gold/white for body text.

do_not_use: gradients on text unless large heading
universal_guidelines.responsive: Mobile-first. Stack grids to 1 column. Reduce padding by 50% on mobile.
